KPI Definitions
Plain-English definitions for the top-line metrics.
Market HoursTotal hours in the current period, scope, and selected hour band.
Largest BandWhen All Bands is selected, this is the hour band with the biggest share of total market hours.
Leader ShareThe leading operator’s share of the currently filtered market hours.
Market ShareFor a selected operator, its share of the currently filtered market hours.
Operator MixHow much of that operator’s own flying is concentrated in the selected band, or 3h+ when All Bands is selected.
Hours / AircraftWingX hours divided by matched JetNET operating aircraft count. Only appears where JetNET matched cleanly.
